properties.displayName: Microsoft Teams external-tenant chat from unverified IT-helpdesk impersonator
properties.description: External Teams chat where displayName contains 'helpdesk' or 'IT support' — common 2024+ vishing pattern (Storm-1811, Black Basta, UNC6692). No CIM data model maps to Teams chats; uses raw O365 audit logs.
properties.query:
// External Teams chat — Teams audit lives in OfficeActivity.
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OfficeWorkload == "MicrosoftTeams"
| where Operation in~ ("MessageSent","ChatCreated","TeamsImpersonationDetected")
| where isnotempty(UserId)
| where Subject has_any ("IT","helpdesk","support","password","verify")
   or Recipients has_any ("IT","helpdesk")
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, Subject, Recipients,
          ClientIP, UserAgent
| order by TimeGenerated desc
